initial_configuration.purpose: To create a safe environment for experimenting with networking, enumeration, exploitation and privilege escalation.

kali-linux.name: Fresh-install-kali-NAT-Only
kali-linux.description: Just a fresh install of kali linux with only one network adapter

kali-linux.name: Kali-Meta
kali-linux.description: A snapshot of the stable state of kali where it is on both NAT adapter with the host os, and internal network with metaploitable

day_1_configuration.purpose: To create an isolated lab system where the attacker has network access and simultaneously has a connection to the intentionally vulnerable machine as well.
